stemHtml: For a jet aeroplane, the speed for maximum range is…

options.a: that corresponding to the point of contact of the tangent from the origin to the Drag versus TAS curve.
options.b: that corresponding to the point of the minimum power required at the Drag versus TAS curve.
options.c: that corresponding to the point of the minimum drag at the Drag versus TAS curve.
options.d: that corresponding to the point of contact of the tangent from the origin to the Power required versus TAS curve.
